facebook.caption: Tucked along 156 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 in Phu Quoc, MIX BAKERY COFFEE & TEA has quietly earned a 4.5-star reputation across nearly 600 reviews, and it is easy to see why foreign visitors keep coming back. Expect freshly baked goods, quality coffee, and a relaxed atmosphere that makes a great start to any island morning. It is the kind of spot where you slow down, recharge, and plan the day ahead. Practical tip: go in the morning when the baked items are freshest and the cafe is at its most peaceful.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the steam rise, the pastries come out, and the morning light fill the room at MIX BAKERY COFFEE & TEA. This is what a proper slow morning in Phu Quoc looks like. Nearly 600 reviewers gave it a 4.5, and after seeing it for yourself, you will understand why.

instagram.caption: Your Phu Quoc morning just got an upgrade. MIX BAKERY COFFEE & TEA at 156 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is a 4.5-star local favourite with nearly 600 reviews. Fresh bakes, good coffee, good vibes. Go early for the best pastries.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh pastries, warm coffee, and zero rush. MIX BAKERY COFFEE & TEA is the slow-morning spot Phu Quoc visitors keep coming back to. 4.5 stars, nearly 600 reviews. Enough said.
